title: ジャパンCの後に・Die Herzenslust

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash was able to stand her ground against
her elite, senior-year opponents. It was a heated
competition, but she's made undeniable progress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll likely have to race against the two of them
again at the Arima Kinen, but Eishin Flash simply
gives a confident nod and says that just means
she'll have to win next time.
